---
title: "minPanel"
author: Tingting Zhan
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    html-math-method: katex
number-sections: true
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-depth: 4
toc-title: ''
editor: source
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    collapse: true
    comment: "#" 
bibliography: ordPanel.bib
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{intro}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Introduction

rewrite
